title: Dekton Flexible Sanding Block - Fine 120 Grit for Multi-Surface Woodworking, Paintwork, Keying Plaster, and Prep Work - Perfect for Achieving a Smooth Finish Between Coats
features: Versatile Use: The Dekton Flexible Sanding Block is ideal for a variety of surfaces, including wood, plaster, and paint. Whether you’re preparing a surface for finishing or smoothing out rough areas, this sanding block is up to the task.

Fine Grit: Featuring a 120 grit texture, this sanding block effectively removes material quickly, making it perfect for heavy sanding jobs. It efficiently tackles stubborn imperfections, allowing for a smoother final finish.

Flexible Design: The unique flexible design conforms to the shape of the surface, ensuring even sanding in both flat and contoured areas. This flexibility helps achieve a professional-looking result without the risk of damaging the material underneath.

Ergonomic Handle: Designed with user comfort in mind, the sanding block features an ergonomic handle that provides a secure grip. This allows for better control during use, reducing hand fatigue and improving overall efficiency.

Durable Construction: Made from high-quality materials, the Dekton Flexible Sanding Block is built to last. It withstands rigorous sanding tasks while maintaining its effectiveness, ensuring you get the most out of your tool for various projects.
description: The Dekton Flexible Sanding Block with 120 grit is your go-to tool for efficient multi-surface sanding. Whether you're tackling woodworking, paintwork, or prepping plaster, this sanding block delivers exceptional performance. Its coarse grit effectively removes material, making it ideal for heavy sanding tasks and ensuring a smooth finish. The flexible design allows the block to conform to various surface shapes, enabling even sanding in both flat and contoured areas. This adaptability is essential for achieving a professional look without damaging the underlying material. Designed with an ergonomic handle, the sanding block offers a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue and enhancing control during use. Made from durable materials, it stands up to rigorous sanding jobs, ensuring long-lasting performance. Whether you're a DIY enthusiast or a professional, the Dekton Flexible Sanding Block is an essential addition to your toolkit, helping you achieve flawless results in every project. Get ready to elevate your sanding experience!
